name: Dry Q72 rainbow, BTN c-bet study
description: BTN open, BB calls; BTN is first to act postflop in this spot (hero = BTN). Dry low-connectivity rainbow — classic solver C-bet spot where polarized sizings dominate. The hero_range is a standard BTN SRP open (enumerated explicitly to work around the range parser's first-rank-iterates semantics for X Ys+). The villain_range is a narrower BB defend: removes very weak hands that would have folded preflop.

input.hero_range: 22+, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A6s, A7s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J9s, JTs, T9s, 98s, 87s, 76s, 65s, A9o, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KTo, KJo, KQo, QTo, QJo, JTo
input.villain_range: 55-TT, A2s, A3s, A4s, A5s, A8s, A9s, ATs, AJs, AQs, AKs, K9s, KTs, KJs, KQs, Q9s, QTs, QJs, J9s, JTs, T9s, 98s, 87s, 76s, 65s, ATo, AJo, AQo, AKo, KJo, KQo, QJo

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. BTN c-bet frequency on dry Q-high boards is expected high (~70%+); watch the per-combo mix on Q7s-type hands.
